scripts.update: npx npm-check-updates -u && npm install && npm run clean
scripts.clean:build: shx rm -rf images profile resource test README.md LEIAME.md LEAME.md
scripts.clean:build:script: npm run clean:script && npm run clean:build
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run clean:package-lock
scripts.git:all: npm run git:add && npm run git:commit && npm run git:push
scripts.format:lint: npm run format && npm run lint
scripts.code:stats: npx cod-stat -c -f -a . --ignore .circleci lib node_modules report res
scripts.code:stats:summary: npx cod-stat -c -f -a . --ignore .circleci lib node_modules report res --json && shx mkdir -p report && shx cp code-stats/report.json report/code.stats.json && shx rm -rf code-stats && npm run tsx -- script/helper/code-stats.ts
scripts.copy:repo: shx cp input/resource/mathjslab/copy.repo.config.json resource/mathjslab/copy.repo.config.json && shx cp input/resource/mathjslab-app/copy.repo.config.json resource/mathjslab-app/copy.repo.config.json && shx cp input/resource/mathjslab-www/copy.repo.config.json resource/mathjslab-www/copy.repo.config.json
scripts.postbuild: npm run mkdir:resource && npm run copy:prettierrc && npm run copy:repo
scripts.build:format:lint: npm run build && npm run format:lint
scripts.do:all: npm run clean:all && npm run update && npm run format:lint && npm run build:format:lint && npm run git:all && echo script "do:all" finished.
